Get O*NET Occupation Details Index

Source: R/occupations.R
onet_occupation_details.Rd

Retrieves the details index for a specific occupation. The response includes links to available detailed sections from the occupation overview.

Usage

onet_occupation_details(code)

Arguments

code

An O*NET-SOC occupation code (e.g., "15-1252.00").

Value

A list containing the available occupation details sections.

Examples

onet_occupation_details("15-1252.00")
#> [[1]]
#> [[1]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/tasks"
#> 
#> [[1]]$title
#> [1] "Tasks"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [[2]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/technology_skills"
#> 
#> [[2]]$title
#> [1] "Technology Skills"
#> 
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [[3]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/hot_technology"
#> 
#> [[3]]$title
#> [1] "Hot Technologies"
#> 
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [[4]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/in_demand"
#> 
#> [[4]]$title
#> [1] "In Demand Skills"
#> 
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [[5]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/work_activities"
#> 
#> [[5]]$title
#> [1] "Work Activities"
#> 
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [[6]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/detailed_work_activities"
#> 
#> [[6]]$title
#> [1] "Detailed Work Activities"
#> 
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [[7]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/work_context"
#> 
#> [[7]]$title
#> [1] "Work Context"
#> 
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [[8]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/job_zone"
#> 
#> [[8]]$title
#> [1] "Job Zone"
#> 
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [[9]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/apprenticeship"
#> 
#> [[9]]$title
#> [1] "Apprenticeship Opportunities"
#> 
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [[10]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/skills"
#> 
#> [[10]]$title
#> [1] "Skills"
#> 
#> 
#> [[11]]
#> [[11]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/knowledge"
#> 
#> [[11]]$title
#> [1] "Knowledge"
#> 
#> 
#> [[12]]
#> [[12]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/education"
#> 
#> [[12]]$title
#> [1] "Education"
#> 
#> 
#> [[13]]
#> [[13]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/abilities"
#> 
#> [[13]]$title
#> [1] "Abilities"
#> 
#> 
#> [[14]]
#> [[14]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/interests"
#> 
#> [[14]]$title
#> [1] "Interests"
#> 
#> 
#> [[15]]
#> [[15]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/work_styles"
#> 
#> [[15]]$title
#> [1] "Work Styles"
#> 
#> 
#> [[16]]
#> [[16]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/related_occupations"
#> 
#> [[16]]$title
#> [1] "Related Occupations"
#> 
#> 
#> [[17]]
#> [[17]]$href
#> [1] "https://api-v2.onetcenter.org/online/occupations/15-1252.00/details/professional_associations"
#> 
#> [[17]]$title
#> [1] "Professional Associations"
#> 
#>
